context: Agent was asked to create a wave execution plan for a CLI refactor. Evaluate the wave document written to .context/plans/scripts-cli-refactor.md.

checklist.name: dependency-graph-section-present
checklist.description: The document contains a Dependency Graph section with an ASCII DAG showing which waves unlock which

checklist.name: all-tasks-assigned-to-exactly-one-wave
checklist.description: All 9 tasks (4 lib extractions, 1 CLI scaffold, 3 commands, 1 cleanup) appear in the document and each appears in exactly one wave

checklist.name: no-dependent-tasks-in-same-wave
checklist.description: No wave contains tasks that depend on each other (e.g. CLI scaffold and lib extraction are NOT in the same wave; cleanup is NOT in the same wave as commands)

checklist.name: parallel-waves-labelled-correctly
checklist.description: Waves containing multiple independent tasks (lib extractions Wave 1, command implementations Wave 3) are labelled 'parallel'

checklist.name: sequential-waves-labelled-correctly
checklist.description: Waves with a single task (CLI scaffold Wave 2, cleanup Wave 4) are labelled 'sequential'

checklist.name: verification-checklist-per-wave
checklist.description: Each wave section includes a Verification checklist with at least one concrete runnable check (e.g. tsc --noEmit, bun run test, git grep check)

checklist.name: branch-strategy-table-present
checklist.description: The document includes a Branch Strategy section with a table assigning one branch per parallel task using the pattern refactor/<task-slug>

checklist.name: output-path-correct
checklist.description: The wave document was written to exactly .context/plans/scripts-cli-refactor.md

checklist.name: wave-count-matches-dag
checklist.description: The document contains exactly 4 waves matching the 4 dependency levels: lib extraction → CLI scaffold → commands → cleanup

checklist.name: goal-section-present
checklist.description: The document includes a Goal section describing the purpose of the refactor in one paragraph

checklist.name: wave-headings-include-execution-mode
checklist.description: Every wave heading includes its execution mode in parentheses, e.g. '### Wave 1 — Extract shared lib (parallel)'
